criteria_results.description: In `server/databaseStorage.ts`, `getUserByUsername` uses `sql` expression with `LOWER()` on both sides of the comparison.
criteria_results.evidence: Method DatabaseStorage/getUserByUsername in server/databaseStorage.ts (lines 18-21) uses sql`LOWER(${users.username}) = LOWER(${username})`.
Method FileStorage/getUserByUsername in server/fileStorage.ts (lines 62-64) uses u.username.toLowerCase() === username.toLowerCase().

criteria_results.description: In `client/src/App.tsx`, `Toaster` and `TooltipProvider` are rendered outside of the `Switch` or conditional route logic.
criteria_results.evidence: In client/src/App.tsx, the AppContent function returns TooltipProvider and Toaster at the root level, wrapping the Switch component.

criteria_results.description: Logging in with 'USER', 'user', or 'User' succeeds for a user registered as 'user'.
criteria_results.evidence: Verified that storage.getUserByUsername is case-insensitive on both storage implementations, and registration checks for existing users using the same case-insensitive method.

criteria_results.description: Login error messages (toasts) appear immediately on the AuthPage.
criteria_results.evidence: Toaster is now mounted in AppContent regardless of authentication state, ensuring toasts triggered in AuthPage are rendered.

next_focus: The task is complete and verified.
